name: CLX - MGA Insurance Stripe Identity Callback v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Public POST. Stripe Identity webhook. Validates Stripe signature using STRIPE_IDENTITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET, looks up kyc_verifications by external_session_id WHERE vertical_id='insurance', updates with verified identity OR failure, computes preliminary aml_risk_score, marks pep_screening_result for manual review (Phase 6 automates), triggers compliance agent (A1.1) on success.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'kyc_' + $('Decide Patch').item.json.status, client_id: $('Decide Patch').item.json.client_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { kyc_id: $('Decide Patch').item.json.kyc_id, lead_id: $('Decide Patch').item.json.lead_id, stripe_event: $('Decide Patch').item.json.event_type }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, review_type: 'kyc', kyc_id: $('Decide Patch').item.json.kyc_id, client_id: $('Decide Patch').item.json.client_id }) }}
